parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'nvidia/nemotron-3-nano-30b-a3b:free', messages: [ { role: 'system', content: 'You are a financial transaction categorizer for a restaurant business (Saffron Kitchen, Dubai). Categorize each transaction into exactly one of these categories: Revenue, COGS, Payroll, Rent & Utilities, Marketing, Software, Professional Services, Travel, Office Supplies, Banking Fees, Government, Other.\n\nReturn ONLY a valid JSON array with each transaction plus a "category" field added. No explanation, no markdown, just the JSON array.' }, { role: 'user', content: JSON.stringify($json.transactions) } ], max_tokens: 2000, temperature: 0 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'qwen/qwen3.6-plus-preview:free', messages: [ { role: 'system', content: 'You are a financial analyst for Saffron Kitchen, a restaurant in Dubai. Generate a concise weekly financial report.

Include:
1. Revenue this week (total credits) — compare to restaurant industry benchmarks
2. Total expenses (total debits) broken down by category
3. Net cash flow and profit margin
4. Top 3 expense categories
5. Any anomalies (unusually large transactions, spikes)
6. Executive summary (3-4 sentences, plain language, actionable)

Currency: AED. Keep it under 400 words. Format for WhatsApp readability (use bullet points, emojis sparingly).' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Week of ' + $json.weekOf + ' to ' + $json.weekEnd + '

KPIs: ' + JSON.stringify($json.kpis) + '

Expenses by category: ' + JSON.stringify($json.expensesByCategory) + '

All categorized transactions:
' + JSON.stringify($json.categorizedTransactions) } ], max_tokens: 1000, temperature: 0.3 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ client_id: '3bd50557-6680-43b9-bb8e-261c7f8a19d2', event_type: 'report_generated', summary: 'Weekly financial report — ' + $json.weekOf + ' | Revenue: AED ' + $json.kpis.totalRevenue + ' | Net: AED ' + $json.kpis.netCashFlow, payload: { report: $json.report, kpis: $json.kpis, report_type: 'weekly_financial' } }) }}
